verdict: T-018 v1.2 full-class re-issue: B^cond diagonal (lemma) => worst-dir norm <= R_lead(Q); class values R_lead 0.174(BCC)/0.609(unif)/0.650(nonunif)<1; triangle => exchange block alone; COMPETITOR-DEPENDENT threshold b_exch(Q)<(1-R_lead(Q))/N_exch(Q), binding full-class target b_star^nonunif=0.0206 (BCC 0.0486 was anchor-only). b_exch is RES-5, not closed. No tier flip.

claims.name: cond_block_diagonal_worstdir
claims.detail: (DIAGONALITY LEMMA: Delta F_od=sum_Q f_Q(G_QQ) [independent channels] => delta G-Hessian block-diagonal in Q => ||B^cond||_op=max-channel ratio. max_Q p_2^2=16<=E_+=540, so the floor->ratio bound certifies ALL directions. Class values: R_lead^BCC=0.174(x5.7), R_lead^unif=0.609(x1.64), R_lead^nonunif<=0.650(x1.54); all<1)

claims.name: triangle_residual_exchange_block_classwide
claims.detail: (||E^-1/2 B_od E^-1/2|| <= R_lead(Q) + rho_exch; full norm <1 provided rho_exch < 1-R_lead(Q). Budgets: BCC 0.826, uniform 0.391, non-uniform 0.350 -- all >0, so the residual is the EXCHANGE BLOCK alone over the whole admissible class, with the TIGHTEST (non-uniform) budget the binding one)

claims.name: gershgorin_competitor_dependent_threshold
claims.detail: (rho_exch<=N_exch*b_exch (N_exch=17 BCC); COMPETITOR-DEPENDENT threshold b_exch(Q)<b_star(Q)=(1-R_lead(Q))/N_exch(Q). Values: b_star^BCC=0.0486, b_star^unif=0.0230, b_star^nonunif=0.0206 (the BINDING full-class target). The v1.1 single number 0.0486 was the BCC anchor only; the class target is ~2.4x tighter)

claims.name: residual_is_res5_scalar_not_closed
claims.detail: (b_exch=max_Q|E^-1/2 B^exch E^-1/2| is the dressed Fock-bubble magnitude; SIGN unfixed by u_eff>0 (bare u=-0.86<0, u_eff=2.685>0 via dressing), beyond second cumulant => RES-5. T-018 reduces the residual to this scalar; it does NOT bound it. No tier flip: B1/B2 T6 on {H-LAYER})

claims.name: quantitative_sanity_const_and_class
claims.detail: (const=(9/4)u_eff^2 B_max N/c_diag=23.20 reproduces operator 23.22; R_lead monotone in K_floor 0.174<0.609<0.650<1; threshold tightens b_star^nonunif=0.0206<b_star^BCC=0.0486; N_exch=17 combinatorial (<=n_chans=54))
